description: Build the Neural Graph Fusion (NGF) engine - activation spreading, path tracing, and verbalizer. This is the core AI engine that spreads activation through the knowledge graph, traces multi-hop paths between concepts, and verbalizes results into natural language. Also add Pythia 1.4B LLM integration module (llama.cpp-style interface as the 'voice' module).
steps: Create ai_core/ngf/ directory for the Neural Graph Fusion engine

Create ai_core/ngf/activation_spreading.cpp - Implements spreading activation through the knowledge graph. When a concept is activated, it spreads energy to connected nodes with decay. Uses MKPatternGraph as the underlying store. Include: ActivationState struct, spread() method with configurable decay/threshold, multi-source activation, convergence detection.

Create ai_core/ngf/path_tracer.cpp - Traces optimal paths between concepts in the graph. Implements breadth-first, depth-first, and weighted shortest path algorithms. Returns MKGraphResult with the full path and confidence. Include: PathTrace struct, traceAll() returning ranked paths, cycle detection, max-hop limiting.

Create ai_core/ngf/verbalizer.cpp - Converts graph paths and activation patterns into natural language. Takes a set of activated nodes and edges, produces coherent English sentences. Include: template library, conjunction handling, confidence-based hedging (definitely/probably/possibly), multi-fact paragraph assembly.

Create ai_core/ngf/ngf_engine.cpp - The orchestrator that combines activation spreading + path tracing + verbalization. Accepts a query, activates source nodes, spreads, traces paths to target, and verbalizes the result. Include: NGFQuery struct, NGFResult struct, and the main think() pipeline.

Create ai_core/ngf/llm_voice.cpp - Pythia 1.4B LLM integration module. Implements a llama.cpp-compatible interface for loading GGUF model files, running inference with KV-cache, sampling (temperature, top-p, top-k), and generating text completions. This is the 'voice' that polishes NGF outputs into fluent language. Include: ModelConfig, load_model(), generate(), sample_token(). Note: actual model weights are referenced by path but the code handles loading/inference.

Create ai_core/ngf/model_config.cpp - Configuration and weight management for the LLM voice module. Defines model architectures (Pythia-1.4B, Pythia-410M), quantization formats (Q4_0, Q4_1, Q8_0), memory requirements, and layer configs. Includes download URLs and SHA256 checksums for model verification.
All files must use #ifndef include guards and MK-prefixed class names. Do NOT include these in mk_entry.cpp yet - they will be integrated in a later feature.
acceptance_criteria: All 6 new .cpp files exist in ai_core/ngf/ directory
Each file has proper #ifndef include guard
Each file has a class with MK prefix (MKActivationSpreading, MKPathTracer, MKVerbalizer, MKNGFEngine, MKLLMVoice, MKModelConfig)
NGF engine demonstrates activation spreading algorithm with decay and threshold
Path tracer implements at least BFS and weighted shortest path
Verbalizer has at least 20 sentence templates for different relation types
LLM voice module has full inference pipeline (load, tokenize, forward pass, sample, decode)
Model config lists Pythia-1.4B architecture details (layers, heads, hidden dim, vocab size)
verification: Run 'make all' from /projects/sandbox/MK_os-2/MK_OS/ and confirm it produces the mk_os binary without errors
